sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi:
Sent by his brother Bao Xin to attack Hua Xiong before Sun Jian could get there and achieve great merit. Going secretly along a by-road with three thousand men, as soon as he reached the pass, Bao Zhong offered battle. Hua Xiong responded by charging with five hundred armoured horseman, crying “Flee not, rebel!”

Bao Zhong grew afraid and turned back but Hua Xiong cut Bao Zhong down with his sword, most of his men captured and Bao Zhong’s head sent to Dong Zhuo.

full_text:
Bao Zhong 鮑忠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bao Zhong (鮑忠). Served Bao Xin, his brother. Died in battle with Hua Xiong. Bao Zhong is a fictional character. Bao Zhong was affiliated with Bao Xin. Bao Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms:5
BiographySanguo Yanyi
Sent by his brother Bao Xin to attack Hua Xiong before Sun Jian could get there and achieve great merit. Going secretly along a by-road with three thousand men, as soon as he reached the pass, Bao Zhong offered battle. Hua Xiong responded by charging with five hundred armoured horseman, crying “Flee not, rebel!”
Bao Zhong grew afraid and turned back but Hua Xiong cut Bao Zhong down with his sword, most of his men captured and Bao Zhong’s head sent to Dong Zhuo.
